body:
Follow-up from the #292 mixed-era placement audit (item 4 of 5).

## Goal

Implement the mixed-era placement test matrix from #292 so every consumer that interprets `ChunkRef.placement` has explicit coverage for empty (pre-M3) and full placement, across schemes, plus a DST scenario seeded with an empty-placement chunk.

## Current coverage vs gaps

| Consumer | empty (None) | empty (RS) | short | full | RS{6,3} |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Read | gap | gap | gap | ✅ `core/tests/placement_record.rs` | gap |
| GC | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | gap (only RS{2,1}) |
| Scrub | gap | gap | gap | ✅ (None) | gap |
| Reconstruction | gap | gap | gap | ✅ (RS{2,1}) | gap |
| Rebalance | gap (bug) | gap (bug) | gap | ✅ (RS{2,1}) | gap |

Existing mixed-era coverage is the #287 GC regression suite (`crates/custodian/tests/gc.rs`). `server/tests/dst_erasure.rs::mixed_era_read` mixes schemes but uses **full** placement from the write path — it does not exercise empty/short vectors.

## Work

- Read: add empty/short placement resolution tests.
- Scrub / reconstruction / rebalance: add mixed-era (empty-placement) cases; the rebalance one is the regression from the rebalance evacuation issue.
- Add larger-scheme (`RS{6,3}`) cases across consumers (the GC suite only covers `RS{2,1}`).
- Add a DST scenario in `dst_erasure.rs` seeded with an explicit empty-placement chunk and assert read + maintenance resolve it identically across seeds.

## Reuse

Existing fixtures: `commit_inode(meta, inode, chunk, size)`, `fragment()`, `valid_fragment()`, `corrupt_fragment()`, `MemMeta` / `MemDServer`. Build on the #287 GC cases as the template.


---

## Addition (post-#292 exhaustiveness sweep): pin reconstruction's re-placement on an empty-placement chunk

Reconstruction's re-placement (`crates/custodian/src/reconstruction.rs:388-418`) looks like the rebalance bug (#346) but is **safe today — only because `assess` expands placement first** (`reconstruction.rs:230` — `(0..fragment_count()).map(placed_dserver)`), so `RepairPlan.placement` is already full-length. That safety is currently **unpinned**: a regression that fed `assess` the raw `chunk.placement` would reintroduce a #346-class materialization bug undetected. Add a reconstruction matrix case that reconstructs a chunk whose committed `placement` is **empty** (pre-M3) and asserts the re-placed record is a **full-length** vector (length `fragment_count()`) with the rebuilt fragment in a distinct domain — not a short/empty write.

milestone.title: M3 — Custodians
milestone.description: The self-maintaining durability plane (L4): GC, scrub, reconstruction, rebalance + durability telemetry. Makes single-zone trustworthy; gates the Step-2 release. Plan: proposal 0005.

title: Implement the mixed-era placement test matrix (read/scrub/reconstruction/rebalance + RS{6,3} + DST)
